instructions: 1. Fill in all the required fields for each unit, role, and department.
2. Ensure the role names correspond to the roles available in the system.
3. Save the file and upload it back through the appropriate interface.
manageInstructions: Manage multiple choice questions in bulk by uploading an Excel file.
instruction: 1. Download the sample Excel sheet and fill in all the required fields.
2. Ensure that the Subject and Topic names exist in the system.
3. Validate the data before uploading to prevent errors.
